@@ -1,9 +1,13 @@
 .DS_Store
 
 # binaries
-foodcli
-foodoracli
-ordercli
+/foodcli
+/foodoracli
+/ordercli
+
+# keep source under cmd/
+!cmd/
+!cmd/**/*
 
 # Go
 *.test

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+package main
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"os"
+
+	"github.com/steipete/ordercli/internal/cli"
+)
+
+func run(args []string) int {
+	ctx := context.Background()
+	if err := cli.Run(ctx, args); err != nil {
+		return 1
+	}
+	return 0
+}
+
+func main() {
+	os.Exit(run(os.Args[1:]))
+}
